name: Folk, Stories & Firelight
blurb: An evening of folk, song and stories with Burton Folk Club — music that's been passed down and songs still being written. Warm, welcoming, and open to all.

name: Winter Sounds
blurb: The moment the community gathers for winter — and the launch night for Founding Membership of The Space Between. Live music, warm drinks, and the chance to be part of what comes next.

name: New Year Community Sing
blurb: No experience needed, no audition, no pressure. Just voices together to start the year. Come as you are.

name: Love Your Local
blurb: A hop between Burton's live music venues on one night — local artists, local pubs, one wristband. A reminder that the town already has a music scene worth keeping.
access: Varies by venue. Details with each listing.

name: Family Music Discovery Day
blurb: Instruments to try, musicians to meet, and music to make together. A free Saturday morning for families to find out what live music feels like from the inside.
access: Step-free. Baby-changing available. BSL on request.

name: Global Sounds
blurb: Music from across the world, made in and around Burton. A celebration of the town's cultures and the musicians who carry them.

name: Music in the Market
blurb: Live music in the heart of Burton's market — free, outdoors, and impossible to miss. A Saturday morning that sounds different.

name: Summer Park Sessions
blurb: A long afternoon in the park with local artists across multiple stages. Bring a blanket. Bring the kids. Bring whoever needs a good afternoon.

name: Youth Takeover
blurb: The stage belongs to Burton's young musicians. A night programmed by and for young people — the next generation of the town's music scene.

name: Community Music Trail
blurb: The year ends — and the case is made. A trail of music across Burton's spaces, charities and community venues, one month before the next Sonic Boom Festival.
access: Varies by venue. Details with each listing.
